Start free →
How it works

From signup to
first sale in 10 minutes

Markuce handles the legal, the compliance, and the payment rails. You focus on what you're selling.

01

Create your account

Sign up with email in under 2 minutes. Set your business name, connect a crypto wallet or bank for payouts, and optionally complete our light KYC. No US LLC required. No Stripe account needed.

Email + password signup
Light KYC via Sumsub (optional)
Solana, Polygon, or Ethereum wallet
Bank payout via Wise in 160+ countries

Step 01

Create your account

02

Create your products

Add your products or services with a name, description, and price. Each product gets a unique hosted checkout URL you can share or embed anywhere — social media, email, your website.

One-time or recurring billing
Any price in USD, EUR, or GBP
Hosted checkout URL instantly
Embeddable in any website

Step 02

Create your products

03

Share your checkout link

Send customers to your hosted Markuce checkout page. They choose between paying by card (Stripe Elements) or crypto (ETH, USDC on Solana, MATIC on Polygon). Prices update live from Chainlink oracles.

Stripe Elements for debit/credit cards
ETH on Ethereum mainnet
USDC on Solana
MATIC on Polygon

Step 03

Share your checkout link

04

Get paid, instantly

Once payment is confirmed — whether card or on-chain — funds are settled. Card payments route through our Stripe Connect platform. Crypto goes non-custodially straight to your wallet. Webhook fires to your server.

Card: settled to your bank via Stripe
Crypto: straight to your wallet
Signed webhook delivery
Real-time dashboard update

Step 04

Get paid, instantly

Two ways to pay.
One checkout.

Card payments

Stripe Elements embedded directly in the checkout. Accepts Visa, Mastercard, Amex, and most local debit cards globally. PCI compliant. 3D Secure where required.

Visa, Mastercard, Amex
Local debit cards
3DS + fraud protection
Instant settlement

Crypto payments

ETH on Ethereum, USDC on Solana, MATIC on Polygon. Prices fetched from Chainlink on-chain oracles — tamper-proof. ±2% tolerance handles price movement during settlement.

ETH · USDC · MATIC
Chainlink oracle prices
±2% tolerance window
Non-custodial to your wallet

Ready to start?

Sign up in 2 minutes. Your first checkout link is 5 minutes after that.

Create free account
Markuce

The global Merchant of Record for the countries traditional payment platforms forgot.
